name: Barnes & Noble Education, Inc.
summary: Barnes & Noble Education, Inc. (BNED) operates college and university bookstores across the United States, providing physical and online retail services for course materials, general merchandise, and related products. The company offers affordable access course material programs including BNC First Day and First Day Complete, digital course materials through partnerships with VitalSource Technologies, and outsourced bookstore management services to higher education institutions.
